Headline: Westbound #75 74th-75th buses are temporarily rerouted near 75th/Perry
ShortDescription: Westbound #75 74th-75th buses are temporarily rerouted via 79th, Lafayette, 76th, Vincennes and 75th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #75 74th-75th buses are temporarily rerouted via 79th, Lafayette, 76th, Vincennes and over the normal route, due to street blockage near 75th/Perry.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #95 95th Temporary Reroute near 95th/Wentworth
ShortDescription: #95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 95th/Wentworth.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 95th/Wentworth.

  • Westbound buses will operate via 95th, Wentworth, 97th, Normal and 95th then resume their regular route. 
  • Eastbound buses will operate via 95th, Halsted, 87th, Lafayette and 95th then resume their regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
